POST.description: This endpoint generates a report by downloading data, analyzing it, and storing the report.

suggested_workflow.complete_code_for_action_derived_from_th: async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session: async with session.get(url) as response: if response.status != 200: return jsonify({"error": "Failed to download data."}), 500 data = await response.text() df = pd.read_csv(io.StringIO(data)) report = {"average_price": df["Price (£)"].mean(), "total_properties": df.shape[0], "details": df.to_dict(orient="records") } global generated_report generated_report = report return jsonify({"message": "Report generated successfully!", "report": report}), 200
suggested_workflow.description: Downloads data, analyzes it to generate a report, and stores it in memory.

GET.description: This endpoint provides the ability to verify if the report generation functionality is available.
This endpoint retrieves the generated report from memory.
